item.title: NASA's ADLR Framework for Lessons Learned
item.author: errbuffoverfl (errbuffoverfl)
item.description: Example: NASA Lesson Number 5756 The ADLR framework is broken up into four parts: Abstract: a two or three sentence summary of what happened.
